positive: A stylized, ethereal woodland creature, combining elements of a deer, fox, and celestial mandalas. The composition must be centrally focused with strong, clean silhouettes, suitable for apparel printing. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau stained glass and detailed linocut etching, utilizing a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and gold leaf accents. The subject is surrounded by stylized ferns, geometric floral patterns, and swirling cosmic dust effects. Composition should maximize negative space for print versatility. Intricate line work, perfect symmetry, highly detailed.
